allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Feat: Add core game systems and monster battle mechanics

- Implement Monster and MonsterData system with ScriptableObjects
- Add CurrencyManager for gold management
- Add MonsterManager for spawning and battle logic
- Implement TapController for click-based damage
- Create UI components (GoldDisplay, MonsterHealthBar)
- Add monster data assets (dragon, icedragon)
- Create monster prefabs with animations
- Add playing scene with game setup
- Update project settings and structure
- Clean up unused scene templates

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor: Move playing scene to Scenes folder

- Move playing.unity from Assets/ to Assets/Scenes/
- Update EditorBuildSettings to reference new scene path
- Remove old SampleScene.unity

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
